title: When you can get refunds on some visa application fees :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## When you can get refunds on some visa application fees
You can only get a refund of your application fees in special circumstances.
When you apply for a visa or submit an expression of interest (EOI), you are normally charged a fee to cover the cost of processing. You can request a refund, but they are given only in special circumstances.

## When you can get a refund
You can apply for a refund if your visa application has not been processed, or you withdraw your EOI. We consider each request individually.
We may give you a refund for reasons such as:
- you paid the application fee but you did not need to
- you paid the wrong fee
- your application is not accepted and is returned to you.

## When you cannot get a refund
You cannot get a refund if:
- your application or request has been processed, even if it was declined
- you suffer financial hardship as a result of a payment to us
- you change your mind about your application or request, including where you submit a second application or request which has a lower fee than the first
- you withdraw your application or request after it has been lodged
- your Expression of Interest (EOI) has been selected
- your EOI has not been selected and has lapsed.

## How to apply for a refund
To apply for a refund, complete the request form and send it to us, along with your supporting information. You will need to provide:
- a copy of the receipt of the application fee
- proof of your bank account
- authorisation from the original fee payer (if you did not pay the original application fee).
The process to withdraw an application is separate to the refund process. Requesting to withdraw your application does not mean you will receive a refund on any fees or levies paid.
Request to withdraw an application

#### Visitor, resident, study, work, EOIs and critical purpose visas
If you are in New Zealand, you can send your refund request to:
Immigration New Zealand DX Box: EP71514 20 Fairfax Avenue Penrose Auckland 1061
If you are applying from outside of New Zealand, you can email your request to us:
visaapplicationfee@mbie.govt.nz
When using this address, if you include queries that are not related to refunds, you will not receive a reply.
